title: CT2.entry completed discharge record — Typed entry — validated minimal counterexample and proper admissible piece
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for semantic CT2-v2 node CT2.entry. It fixes the runtime identity, presentation order, successful status, and exact contract evidence without converting the semantic ID back to a numbered obligation ID.

tacticId.description: Owning tactic discriminator for CT2.entry; it must be CT2.

nodeId.description: Stable semantic runtime identifier for Typed entry — validated minimal counterexample and proper admissible piece.

nodeNumber.description: One-based presentation-order index for CT2.entry; it is not part of the semantic identity.

status.description: Required successful completion state for CT2.entry, matching its entry runtime role.

dischargedContracts.description: Exact contract families discharged at CT2.entry: S-Def.

contains.description: Requires S-Def, which defines the validated typed state and its exact fields.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract instances for CT2.entry; one S-Def record is required for each declared family.

schema.description: Discriminator for the S-Def evidence at CT2.entry; this instance defines the validated typed state and its exact fields.

statement.informal: Typed entry — validated minimal counterexample and proper admissible piece.

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Supply the declared proof-carrying state, decision, certificate, or payload. Every outgoing edge is available only through its named typed constructor and evidence slots.
